summary:
Baricitinib demonstrates proven effectiveness in treating severe alopecia areata, evidenced by FDA approval based on robust clinical trial results—particularly from BRAVE-AA1 and BRAVE-AA2—which show significant improvements in hair regrowth using objective markers such as SALT scores. This effectivity is well-supported by both regulatory action and observed patient-level outcomes, even amid noted safety considerations.  

$\boxed{\text{A}}$

This effectivity is well-supported by both regulatory action and observed patient-level outcomes, even amid noted safety considerations.  

$\boxed{\text{A}}$. Answer choice: A
